title: How much edit experience should the model receive?
decision: Retire the pooled and observed-step-attention state family; neither uses literal edit actions causally, so no scale, data, or hierarchy continuation is justified.
plain_summary: Eleven jobs completed across three rounds. Local losses remain at chance, and direct step attention improves assignment only to 27.56% while still ignoring shuffled actions, losing to persistence, and damaging rank. A future restart requires a new token-aligned recursive formulation.
